title: I scanned Google.com for quantum vulnerabilities — they're already deploying post-quantum crypto (but it's not enough)
author: Priyanshu Vishwakarma
summary:
I built an open-source post-quantum cryptography scanner called pqscan and decided to run a full scan against google.com. The results were surprising.

The Command 


bash
pqscan --full-scan google.com
full_text:
I built an open-source post-quantum cryptography scanner called pqscan and decided to run a full scan against google.com. The results were surprising.
